description: CompositionBlack T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFitStandardWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsWear your love for the brand by slipping into this T-shirt from nike. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary dry comfort making it a great everyday wear for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look.
